film.title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
film.overview: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.

dialogues.dialogue: You are a keeper of our culture in this part of the world. Your father is a poet? I think you should be ashamed of yourself, doing what you're doing here. Right.
Yet say I must smile... My wisest ally, and I'd cut him to the quick. Only his pride. Please, Changez, don't let yours get in the way of doing the right thing.

and now I get this s**t, this f*****g s**t from you too now? Hmm? - I don't...I thought... I thought...I thought you'd be proud of me. - Why would I be proud? What? Proud of being your own little pet artistic project?
